summary: GH-98 spec is approved for a minimal failure mapping contract. The spec keeps scope limited to a declarative package asset, manifest/lifecycle/schema/fixture references, and offline validator consumption, and explicitly excludes Core result envelope fields, App UI copy, runtime evidence, Harbor evidence schema, local package resolution, lock behavior, and write-capability behavior.
reviewed_validation_summary: Spec review consumed `.loom/specs/GH-98/spec.md`, `.loom/specs/GH-98/plan.md`, `.loom/specs/GH-98/implementation-contract.md`, and `.loom/specs/GH-98/task-carrier.md`; `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-98 --json` and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-98 --json` passed.
follow_ups: GH-99 through GH-103 must cover local package resolution, package ref/lock, sample package closeout, Core fixture consumption, and deferred write guardrail.
